title: triorchis ovalis
intro: Triorchis ovalis, also known as the three-angled orchid, is a type of flowering plant in the orchid family. This plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Triorchis ovalis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and promote wound healing, making it a popular remedy for various ailments. Triorchis ovalis can be prepared in various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties.
